query: are there any members of the crew of the Enterprise missing?
response: There are two crewmembers unaccounted for.
Lieutenant Edward Hagler and Ensign Sariel Rager.
They have not been present since twenty three thirty two hours.

query: emergency entry, Chief Medical Officer Beverly Crusher.

response: There are five thousand forty seven classifications of tables on file. Specify design parameters.

query: show me a rectangular conference table.
reduce the height of the table by twenty five percent.
decrease the table's surface area by twenty percent and incline the top fifteen degrees.
give me a bright light right above the table.
create a restraining arm attached to the right side of the table, at the mid-point.
put controls on the restraining arm. A control panel. Lights.
create a metal swing arm, double jointed, total length one metre. Connect it to the head of the table.

produce a pair of scissors attached to the armature. The handle is wrong. It was not scissors. Computer, make the handle a single grip ten centimetres long, solid metal. Now make one blade longer, curved inward. And give the other blade a jagged edge.
